title: Model Purchase
description: Browse curated default, ChatGPT, MiniMax, and top US-China model packages with billing-ready monthly, quarterly, and yearly plans.

empty.title: No model packages available
empty.description: The purchase catalog returned no vendor packages. Refresh and try again.

error.title: Unable to load the model purchase catalog
error.description: We could not fetch vendor packages right now. Please retry.

monthly.label: Monthly
monthly.description: Flexible monthly procurement for launch and testing.

quarterly.label: Quarterly
quarterly.description: A steadier package for teams with predictable growth.

yearly.label: Yearly
yearly.description: The strongest quota, support, and cost envelope.

payment.title: Review and pay for the selected package
payment.description: This step locks the selected vendor package and billing cycle. Use the back action if you need to make changes.
payment.packageDetailsDescription: Confirm the chosen vendor package and payment method here. Package switching is intentionally disabled in this step.
payment.lockedHint: Need a different package or billing cycle? Return to the previous step and choose again before paying.
payment.methodDescription: Review the preferred payment method for this package. Order submission stays disabled until a live billing contract is connected for curated vendor packages.
payment.methodTapToUse: Tap to pay with this method
payment.scanTitle: Scan or continue with the selected method
payment.scanDescription: {{method}} will be used once commercial checkout is enabled for this workspace.
payment.summaryDescription: This screen acts as a commercial quote preview. The order button remains disabled until a live order service is available.
payment.summaryLocked: Package changes require going back first.
payment.unavailableMessage: Curated vendor packages are not connected to a live order and payment API in this workspace yet. Use this page as a pricing preview only.

freeMembership.title: Free Membership
freeMembership.tagline: See the package structure first and upgrade only when you are ready to buy.
freeMembership.audience: First-time visitors and light evaluation users
freeMembership.note: No purchase needed. Basic member rights are available after sign-in.

benefits.savePreferences: Save your preferred vendor and billing cycle
benefits.memberUpdates: Receive package updates and member notices
benefits.upgradeAnytime: Upgrade to a paid package at any time

default.tagline: Balanced routing for teams that want one commercial lane.
default.heroDescription: Blend US and China routes into one shared quota pool.

openai.tagline: Premium GPT packages for agents, chat, and reasoning.
openai.heroDescription: Ideal for premium assistants and operator copilots.

anthropic.tagline: Long-context procurement for writing and knowledge work.
anthropic.heroDescription: Designed for review, policy, and document-heavy use cases.

google.tagline: Multimodal packages for search, docs, and workspace AI.
google.heroDescription: Great for image, document, and multimodal product flows.

xai.heroDescription: For media, social, and real-time assistant experiences.

meta.tagline: Open-weight aligned packages with routed governance.
meta.heroDescription: Good for builders mixing open-weight flexibility with managed routing.

mistral.tagline: Efficient European packages for cost-aware copilots.
mistral.heroDescription: Strong for automation and productivity without premium spend.

cohere.tagline: Search and RAG procurement with enterprise posture.
cohere.heroDescription: Built for retrieval, embeddings, and business copilots.

microsoft.heroDescription: Best for workflow automation and corporate procurement.

amazon-nova.tagline: AWS-centered packages for scalable routed procurement.
amazon-nova.heroDescription: A clean buying lane for AWS-native product teams.

nvidia.tagline: Inference-heavy packages for GPU-first platform teams.
nvidia.heroDescription: Optimized for teams that care about throughput and hybrid deployment.

deepseek.tagline: High value reasoning and coding packages.
deepseek.heroDescription: Excellent for engineering, analysis, and price-performance routing.

qwen.tagline: Balanced domestic packages for multilingual enterprise AI.
qwen.heroDescription: A versatile lane for general domestic business applications.

zhipu.tagline: Domestic GLM packages with clean procurement structure.
zhipu.heroDescription: Well suited for enterprise deployments and regulated buyers.

baidu.tagline: Enterprise-friendly packages for search and knowledge systems.
baidu.heroDescription: A practical buy for assistants, search, and knowledge workflows.

tencent-hunyuan.tagline: Tencent ecosystem packages for consumer-scale AI products.
tencent-hunyuan.heroDescription: Best for broad service platforms and high-volume assistants.

doubao.tagline: Fast-growing consumer packages for creator-scale AI.
doubao.heroDescription: Suited for high-volume user products and creator tooling.

moonshot.tagline: Long-context packages for research and document copilots.
moonshot.heroDescription: Excellent when long documents are central to the user journey.

minimax.tagline: Multimodal packages for expressive AI product experiences.
minimax.heroDescription: Great for long sessions, multimodal apps, and media-rich use cases.
